shippingPolicy.title: Shipping Policy
shippingPolicy.subtitle: Fast & Reliable Delivery
shippingPolicy.intro: At SadhanaCart, we are committed to delivering your orders quickly and efficiently. This Shipping Policy outlines how and when your items will be shipped.

section1.title: Processing Time
section1.point1: Orders are typically processed within 1–3 business days.
section1.point2: Vendors may require extra time during high-demand periods.

section2.title: Shipping Methods
section2.point1: We offer standard and express shipping options.
section2.point2: Shipping carriers may vary depending on location and vendor.

section3.title: Estimated Delivery Times
section3.point3: Delivery times may vary by vendor and region.

section4.title: Shipping Charges
section4.point1: Shipping charges are calculated at checkout.
section4.point2: Free shipping may be available on select products or orders above ₹500.

section5.title: International Shipping
section5.point1: Currently, we only ship within India.
section5.point2: International shipping options will be added in future updates.

section6.title: Delays and Tracking
section6.point1: We will notify you via email in case of delays due to weather, holidays, or vendor issues.
section6.point2: A tracking number will be provided once your order ships.

section7.title: Undeliverable Packages
section7.point1: If a package is returned due to an incorrect address or failed delivery, we will contact you to resolve it.

help.title: Need Help With Shipping?
help.description: Contact our customer support team for any shipping-related questions or issues.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Please read these terms carefully before using our multi-vendor application. By using the app, you agree to these terms.

section1.title: 1. User Accounts
section1.point1: You must register an account to make purchases or sell products.
section1.point2: You are responsible for maintaining account confidentiality.
section1.point3: You must provide accurate and complete information.

section2.title: 2. Vendor Responsibilities
section2.point1: Vendors must ensure products are legal and genuine.
section2.point2: Vendors are responsible for fulfillment and refunds.
section2.point3: Vendors must comply with applicable laws.

section3.title: 3. Purchases and Payments
section3.point2: We use secure third-party payment gateways.

section4.title: 4. Prohibited Activities
section4.point1: Selling counterfeit or restricted items is prohibited.
section4.point2: Attempting to hack or disrupt the platform is forbidden.
section4.point3: Automated tools to manipulate listings are not allowed.

section5.title: 5. Intellectual Property
section5.point1: All logos and trademarks belong to us or partners.
section5.point2: Users may not copy content without permission.
section5.point3: Vendors retain ownership of their listings.

section6.title: 6. Termination
section6.point1: We may suspend accounts for violations.
section6.point2: Terminated users may lose access to data.
section6.point3: Users may appeal decisions via support.

section7.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
section7.point1: We are not liable for damages from app usage.
section7.point2: Transactions are between vendors and customers.
section7.point3: We do not guarantee product quality or delivery.

terms.acceptanceText: By using our app, you confirm that you agree to these terms.

about.subtitle: Conscious Products. Trusted Shopping. Meaningful Living.
about.title: About Sadhana Cart
about.lead: A conscious e-commerce platform built on trust, quality, and ethical sourcing.
about.description: Sadhana Cart curates spiritual essentials, wellness products, and natural goods with a focus on authenticity and simplicity.
about.missionText: To provide ethically sourced, high-quality products through a reliable online marketplace.
about.visionText: To become a trusted global ecommerce destination blending tradition with modern technology.
about.teamSubtitle: Dedicated professionals working behind the scenes
about.ctaText: Discover meaningful products that support a balanced lifestyle.

returnPolicyObj.title: Return & Refund Policy
returnPolicyObj.subtitle: Easy returns, refunds, and exchanges
returnPolicyObj.intro: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase on SadhanaCart. Please review our policy on returns, refunds, and exchanges below.

section1.title: Return Window
section1.point1: Items can be returned within 7 days of delivery.
section1.point2: Some products may have different return periods specified on their product page.
section1.point3: Requests made after the return window cannot be accepted.

section2.title: Non-Returnable Items
section2.point1: Personal care products, cosmetics, and innerwear cannot be returned due to hygiene reasons.
section2.point2: Customized items, gift cards, and clearance sale products.
section2.point3: Products that are damaged, used, or missing original price tags/packaging.
section2.point4: Spiritual/pooja items that have been used.

section3.title: Return Process
section3.point1: Go to 'My Orders' and select the item you wish to return.
section3.point2: Choose a reason for return and submit the request.
section3.point3: Once approved, a pickup executive will collect the package within 2-3 business days.
section3.point4: Please keep the item in its original condition with packaging and tags intact.

section4.title: Refunds
section4.point1: Refunds are processed after the returned product passes quality check.
section4.point2: For online payments, refund is credited to the original payment method or wallet within 5-7 business days.
section4.point3: For Cash on Delivery (COD) orders, the amount will be refunded directly to your SadhanaCart Wallet.
section4.point4: SadhanaCart Wallet Coins can be used instantly for future purchases.

section5.title: Exchanges
section5.point1: Exchanges are subject to stock availability.
section5.point2: You can request a size or color exchange for eligible products.
section5.point3: If the desired item is out of stock, a refund will be issued instead.
section5.point4: No additional delivery charge is levied on approved exchanges.

section6.title: Damaged or Defective Items
section6.point1: If you receive a damaged or wrong product, please report it within 24 hours of delivery.
section6.point2: Upload clear images of the product showing the defect or issue.
section6.point3: We will arrange a free replacement or instant refund.
section6.point4: Ensure the delivery package and invoice are kept safe.

help.title: Need Help with Returns?
help.description: Our customer support team is available 24/7 to assist you with any return or refund queries.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us
privacy.intro: Welcome to SadhanaCart. Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our website and mobile application.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
accountPoints: Login credentials (if you create an account)
transactionPoints: Payment information (processed securely via third-party payment providers)

section3.title: 3. Sharing Your Information
section3.text1: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information with:
section3.text2: These partners are required to keep your information secure.

section4.title: 4. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
section4.text: You can disable cookies through your browser settings.

section5.title: 5. Data Security
section5.text: We take appropriate security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.

section7.title: 7. Children’s Privacy
section7.text: SadhanaCart does not knowingly collect data from children under 13 years of age. If we become aware of such data, we will delete it.

section8.title: 8. Third-Party Links
section8.text: Our app or website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.

section9.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
section9.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.

section10.title: 10. Contact Us
section10.text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy:

helpOtherCustomers: Help other customers make better decisions

careersPage.title: Join Our Team
careersPage.subtitle: Build the Future of Conscious Commerce
careersPage.intro: At SadhanaCart, we are on a mission to connect authentic vendors with conscious buyers. We are looking for passionate, driven individuals to join our growing team.
careersPage.value1Desc: Be part of a business focused on ethical sourcing and supporting local artisans.
careersPage.value2Desc: We value your personal time and promote a healthy, balanced lifestyle.
careersPage.value3Desc: Get access to training, mentorship, and opportunities to advance your career.
careersPage.successMsg: Application submitted successfully! We will contact you soon.
careersPage.job1Desc: Build and scale high-performance user interfaces. Experience with React, Redux, and Bootstrap required.
careersPage.job2Desc: Onboard new verified vendors and manage store setups. Strong communication and coordination required.
careersPage.job3Desc: Drive customer acquisition, SEO, and social media campaigns to promote local products.
careersPage.job4Desc: Assist users with order details, returns, and query resolutions 24/7.

blogPage.title: Sadhana Insights
blogPage.subtitle: Life, Conscious Shopping & Tech Updates
blogPage.author: By {{name}}
blogPage.post1Excerpt: Simple ways to practice mindfulness, stay calm, and bring peace to your busy modern schedule.
blogPage.post1Content: Mindfulness is not about sitting silently on a cushion for hours; it is about bringing full awareness to your everyday actions. Whether it is enjoying your morning tea, listening to a colleague, or shopping consciously, living in the present moment reduces stress and boosts focus. In this article, we explore simple micro-habits you can build starting today.
blogPage.post2Excerpt: A comprehensive guide to identifying high-quality, genuine traditional products and supporting local artisans.
blogPage.post2Content: Spiritual items and pooja essentials carry deep traditional and cultural values. However, with synthetic materials flooding the market, finding authentic items can be tough. We break down the key indicators of genuine products—from natural brass ware to organically certified incense—and explain how conscious sourcing directly helps traditional craft clusters in India.
blogPage.post3Excerpt: A walkthrough of our latest features including localized language support, dynamic greetings, and wallet rewards.
blogPage.post3Content: We are thrilled to launch SadhanaCart 2.0! Our team has been working hard to make our platform more inclusive. You can now browse, shop, and track your orders in English, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, and Malayalam. We have also added a dynamic home greeting based on your local time, and wallet coin rewards to help you save on every transaction.

supportTeamHere: Our support team is here for you
referSubtitle: Invite your friends and earn premium reward coins together!
conversionNote: Convert your referral balance to Reward Coins to apply them for instant discounts at checkout (1 Coin = ₹1).
step1Desc: Invite your friends using your unique referral code.
step2Desc: Your friend signs up using your code and makes a purchase.
step3Desc: Once the order delivers successfully, both of you get cashback coins!
referAndEarnIntro: Earn rewards easily by referring your friends to Sadhana Cart!
shareCodeDesc: Find your unique referral code in the 'Refer & Earn' section and share it with your friends.
friendSignsUpDesc: Your friend signs up using your referral code.
getRewardedDesc: Once your friend places their first successful order, both you and your friend will receive rewards points automatically in your wallets!
coinsValueNote: Each reward coin is equivalent to ₹1 and can be applied during checkout for discounts.
